ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing On Pltf'S Request For Entry Of Court Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-28-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: K. Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Viscio #12353.

Kaipo Young, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 690 Market Club Owners Assocition.
Plaintiff Witness Tracy knighten, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Alan M. Zneiner, ind. and as Trustee of the Revocable Trust Declaration of Alan M. Zneiner and Ann Y. Zneiner; Ann Y. Zneimer, ind. and as Trustee of the Revocable Trust Declaration of Alan M. Zneiner and Ann Y. Zneiner.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages - $37,469.68
Attorney fees - $3172.08
Prejudgment Interest - $9396.82
Costs - $537.50 for a total judgment in the amount of $50,576.08
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
